metadata.name: Multi-Step Analysis Chain
metadata.description: Enhanced chain with analysis, transform and structured output

steps.title: Analyze text
steps.aim: Analyze the input text and extract key information
steps.reasoning_questions: What is the main topic? What are the key points? What is the sentiment?
steps.stage_action: Read and analyze the input text thoroughly
steps.example_reasoning: Looking at this text, the main topic is X. Key points are A, B, C. The sentiment appears to be positive...

steps.title: Extract entities
steps.aim: Extract named entities from the analyzed text
steps.reasoning_questions: What people, places, and organizations are mentioned?
steps.example_reasoning: From the text I can identify: Person - John Smith, Organization - ACME Corp, Location - New York...

steps.title: Generate report
steps.reasoning_questions: What format should the report follow?
steps.stage_action: Create a JSON report with all extracted information
steps.example_reasoning: I will structure the report with summary, entities, and sentiment fields...
